assembly_context.name: 4Axis_RobotArm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 一个包含底座、3个活动关节臂（Link1-3）及集成夹爪的4轴机械臂装配体。底座为长方体带顶部旋转轴；连杆由中间圆柱和两端方块组成，通过侧面销孔配合连接；最上方连杆集成V型夹爪。所有尺寸单位为mm。

global_coordinate_system.x_direction: Forward (aligned with Link1 initial extension direction)
global_coordinate_system.y_direction: Right hand rule relative to X and Z

design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for modeling code.
Use nominal dimensions for part modeling; assembly constraints handle fit/clearance.
Links rotate around their respective joint axes.
assembly_sequence: Insert Base and fix to GROUND.
Insert Link1. Constrain bottom_hole_axis to Base.main_axis_z (concentric). Constrain Link1.bottom_face_block to Base.top_face_main (coincident/offset).
Insert Link2. Constrain Link2.bottom_hole_axis to Link1.top_pin_axis (concentric). Constrain Link2.bottom_side_face to Link1.top_block_side_face (coincident).
Insert Link3_Gripper. Constrain Link3.bottom_hole_axis to Link2.top_pin_axis (concentric). Constrain Link3.bottom_side_face to Link2.top_block_side_face (coincident).

part.name: Link2
part.function: Second rotating arm segment connecting Link1 to Link3.
part.shape: Identical geometry to Link1 but rotated 90 degrees in assembly context. Central cylinder D50xL150. End blocks 60x60x20. Bottom block has side hole D10. Top block has side pin D10.
part.material_or_notes: Default material. Note: Orientation differs from Link1 in assembly.

faces.name: bottom_side_face
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal -Y (local, assuming hole on Y- side)

faces.name: top_side_face
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal +Y (local, assuming pin on Y+ side)

axes.name: bottom_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Y, centered in bottom block side

axes.name: top_pin_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Y, centered in top block side

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole axis coincident with Link1 top_pin_axis.
Side face of bottom block coincident with side face of Link1 top block (flush).
Top pin axis will mate with Link3 bottom hole.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Bottom Block Z=-20 to 0. Top Block Z=150 to 170.
Bottom Hole: On side face (e.g., Y- face at Y=-30) of Bottom Block. Sketch Circle D10 centered at Z=-10 (mid-block height). Extrude cut inward 20mm along +Y.
Top Pin: On side face (e.g., Y+ face at Y=30) of Top Block. Sketch Circle D10 centered at Z=160. Extrude out 20mm along +Y.
